overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 following an NCPD officer walking through a rain-soaked futuristic urban corridor. The officer passes neon-lit digital billboards and vending machines before encountering a pedestrian with a red umbrella and approaching a police vehicle where colleagues are working on equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

events.description: large digital billboard transitions display content from abstract graphics to advertisement showing a human face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor, passing illuminated advertising displays and glass walls showing the rainy street outside

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench near the vending machines on the right side

entered.detail: overhead concrete and glass structure providing shelter from rain
tall glass wall separating walkway from the street, showing palm trees and rain outside
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on the right wall
red and white automated vending machine with glowing display
low concrete seating structure along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway during a rainy night. The camera follows an NCPD officer walking past glass walls that reveal palm trees and wet streets outside. Digital billboards and vending machines line the right wall while a person sits on a concrete bench. The large digital display changes content midway through the segment.

events.description: pedestrian with red umbrella passes close to camera, temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the corridor, passing a pedestrian carrying a red umbrella while approaching a police vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: walking with a red umbrella and orange jacket, moving opposite to ego's direction through the corridor

entered.detail: futuristic black armored police SUV with roof equipment and NCPD markings
large rectangular planter with greenery separating walkway from street

segments.scene_description: The officer continues walking through the covered corridor as a pedestrian with a distinctive red umbrella passes by in the opposite direction. The large digital billboard and bench exit the frame as a police armored vehicle becomes visible in the distance ahead. The camera maintains a steady following position as the officer approaches the vehicle.

events.description: ego slows and stops near the police vehicle, turning to observe colleagues working on equipment

agents.ego_description: approaching the police vehicle and stopping to observe fellow officers working on equipment at the rear of the armored SUV

notable_agents.action: police officer bent over working on blue equipment case connected to the vehicle
police officer standing guard with weapon drawn near the vehicle

entered.detail: blue police equipment case with cables and monitoring devices connected to the vehicle

segments.scene_description: The officer arrives at the police checkpoint where an armored vehicle is parked. Two other officers are present—one working on an equipment crate at the rear of the vehicle and another standing guard. The camera circles slightly around the vehicle as the officer stops to observe the scene, with the covered walkway ceiling still visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that transitions from a neon-lit pedestrian walkway to a focused police checkpoint. It begins by following an NCPD officer past glass walls and vending machines, where a large digital billboard shifts its content as the officer passes a person resting on a concrete bench. As the officer continues forward, a pedestrian with a red umbrella crosses their path in the opposite direction, and the bright displays fade from view to reveal an armored police vehicle waiting in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera maintains its steady pace, closing the gap between the officer and the vehicle. Finally, the camera circles slightly around the armored transport to reveal two colleagues working on equipment crates beneath the shelter of the covered walkway.
